title: astragalus carltonii
intro: Astragalus carltonii, also known as the Carlton's milkvetch, is a perennial plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus carltonii include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Astragalus carltonii can be prepared into various herbal products, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
